w:r.w:t: *Study Plan should recommend redoing any Unit 2 - Learn lessons that were not passed before continuing to Quant Exercise 1
You need to improve your understanding/planning/solving
*Study Plan should add any Unit 2 - Learn lessons that were not passed to the Unit 3 - Review section (above the Unit 2 Quant Review Set)
You need to improve your understanding/planning/solving
*Study Plan should recommend redoing any Unit 3 - Learn lessons that were not passed before continuing to Quant Exercise 2
You need to improve your understanding/planning/solving
*Study Plan should add any Unit 3 - Learn lessons that were not passed to the Unit 4 - Review section (above the Unit 3 Quant Review Set)
You need to improve your understanding/planning/solving
*Study Plan should recommend redoing any Unit 4 - Learn lessons that were not passed before continuing to Quant Exercise 3
You need to improve your understanding/planning/solving
*Study Plan should add any Unit 4 - Learn lessons that were not passed to the Unit 5 - Review section (above the Unit 4 Quant Review Set)
You need to improve your understanding/planning/solving
*Study Plan should recommend redoing any Unit 5 - Learn lessons that were not passed before continuing to Quant Exercise 4
You need to improve your understanding/planning/solving
*Study Plan should add any Unit 5 - Learn lessons that were not passed to the Unit 6 - Review section (above the Unit 5 Quant Review Set)
You need to improve your understanding/planning/solving
*Study Plan should recommend redoing any Unit 6 - Learn lessons that were not passed before continuing to Quant Exercise 5
You need to improve your understanding/planning/solving
*If CR Exercise 4 is not passed, Study Plan should add CR Lesson 5 to the Unit 4 - Review section (above the Unit 3 Verbal Review Set)
You need to improve: identifying, extracting key info, targeting, eliminating
If Unit 2 Quant Review Set Not Passed: Relevant Unit 2 lessons, Quant Exercise 1, & Unit 2 Quant Review Set
If Unit 2 Quant Review Set Passed: Unit 2 Quant Review Set
*If CR Exercise 5 is not passed, Study Plan should add CR Lesson 6 to the Unit 5 - Review section (above the Unit 4 Verbal Review Set)
You need to improve: identifying, extracting key info, targeting, eliminating
If Unit 3 Quant Review Set Not Passed: Relevant Unit 3 lessons, Quant Exercise 2, & Unit 3 Quant Review Set
If Unit 3 Quant Review Set Passed: Unit 3 Quant Review Set
*If CR Exercise 6 is not passed, Study Plan should add CR Lesson 7 to the Unit 6 - Review section (above the Unit 5 Verbal Review Set)
You need to improve: identifying, extracting key info, targeting, eliminating
If Unit 4 Quant Review Set Not Passed: Relevant Unit 4 lessons, Quant Exercise 3, & Unit 4 Quant Review Set
If Unit 4 Quant Review Set Passed: Unit 4 Quant Review Set
If Unit 5 Quant Review Set Not Passed: Relevant Unit 5 lessons, Quant Exercise 4 & Unit 5 Quant Review Set
If Unit 5 Quant Review Set Passed: Unit 5 Quant Review Set
